creator: takefu@airport.fm
text:
Do you have something to do to me?

(In reply to John W. O'Brien from comment #6)
> These ports (sysutils/munin-{common,master,node}) are now marked BROKEN per
> https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports-announce/2014-September/
> 000092.html. Can I offer any help in completing the staging work here?
